programmes.show_description: Clayton's Towing navigates tidal pressures and bull sharks to salvage two yachts from Moreton Bay as part of the Queensland Government's clean-up of abandoned wrecks.
Jessie from GRS Towing has to transport an eight-tonne river boat across three states for a desperate oyster farmer who is relying on the boat to save her family's business.
The heaviest rainfall in 70 years sparks a flood emergency in NSW. Wagga Truck Towing rescue 360K dollars' worth of farm equipment and a semi-trailer that's jackknifed into a swamp.
Craig and his team are pushed to breaking point after a serious accident with a fully loaded logging truck traps their lead driver. Is having the most dangerous job in Canada worth it?
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
A driver nearly causes carnage to make sure his takeaway stays hot, a large cannabis stash is found at the scene of a crash, and a drunk driver gets caught short.
Three teenagers allegedly threaten a shopkeeper with a gun. The firearms team flood the area and it's not long before Paul and Lewis catch sight of a trio who fit the bill.
Phil Broughton pulls a young lad in an old Vauxhall that's suspected of being on cloned plates. The biggest surprise of all comes when Phil discovers it's the driver's 15th birthday.
Western tale starring Audie Murphy and Brian Donlevy. When a vigilante leader dies during the Civil War, an inexperienced young Jesse James assumes command. (1950)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western tale starring Audie Murphy and Brian Donlevy. When a vigilante leader dies during the Civil War, an inexperienced young Jesse James assumes command. (1950)
Hell-bent on retribution, a flinty gunslinger rides into a sleepy western town seeking revenge after a local roughneck kidnapped his wife years ago. Starring Randolph Scott. (1957)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Hell-bent on retribution, a flinty gunslinger rides into a sleepy western town seeking revenge after a local roughneck kidnapped his wife years ago. Starring Randolph Scott. (1957)
In Manchester, Sam - aka Hiab princess - must deliver three huge shipping containers to a remote farm. In Birmingham, Mark's in charge of moving a 57-foot-long canal boat to a marina.
Yorkshire's traffic cops are in hot pursuit of some criminals dragging a generator with just one wheel across the county, and a van full of contraband in Bradford.
Profiling the work of a high-speed police interception unit, with an epic 80mph pursuit involving eight police cars and an 'eye in the sky', leading to carnage on the Yorkshire roads.
PC Will Hunter gets out the breathalyser for a driver - will he be over the limit the morning after the night before? And police pull up a suspected cloned car.
Two men attempt to evade a helicopter and armed responsible vehicles on a motorbike. Officers Clarkie and Nick stop two dangerous road racers.
Jamie has doubts about bringing his son onboard when the teen spends his pay on piercings. Kevin shows up to a wreck without the gear he needs; when confronted, he storms off the job.
The panel of drivers and experts assess more traffic incidents including illegal road racers on the motorway, heart-stopping near misses, and the dangers of drinking and driving up close. (Ep2)
Pilot episode of the cult drama series. Sceptical agent Dana Scully is assigned a new partner - Fox 'Spooky' Mulder - notorious for his fascination with the supernatural.
When Craig's brother Brent cuts corners to get extra wood off the mountain, a mistake shuts the entire operation down. Craig needs to decide if he can bail Brent out.
Outback legend Steve Grahame is hauling three million dollars' worth of vital power generating equipment to Kalumburu, an isolated community in the far North West of Australia.
A £300,000 supercar has crashed in a Surrey wood. Daniel and Sean have to whip out a chainsaw to cut their own exit route. A 14-ton road sweeper needs recovering on a farmyard.
Action in this episode includes a burning truck full of bricks on the A69, a tipper truck caught in mud on a private lane, and a Sprinter Van with a broken rear differential.

Yorkshire's traffic cops are in hot pursuit of some criminals dragging a generator with just one wheel across the county, and a van full of contraband in Bradford.
This episode opens with the hunt for three teens alleged to have threatened a shopkeeper with a gun. The firearms team flood the area.
Police follow up reports of a crossbow. Mark pursues the world's worst driver.
Joel McCrea, Randolph Scott and Mariette Hartley star as a group who try to steal gold from a mine in the state of New Mexico. (1962)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Joel McCrea, Randolph Scott and Mariette Hartley star as a group who try to steal gold from a mine in the state of New Mexico. (1962)
Western. When a town boss confiscates homesteaders' supplies after gold is discovered, a tough cowboy risks his life to try and get it to them. Starring James Stewart and Rock Hudson. (1952)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western. When a town boss confiscates homesteaders' supplies after gold is discovered, a tough cowboy risks his life to try and get it to them. Starring James Stewart and Rock Hudson. (1952)
A 36-tonne crusher needs transporting from Anglesey to Liverpool, and a holiday home is moved from Hull to the Isle of Arran..
A speeding murder suspect is pursued through downtown Bradford, and a speeding car thief picks a fight with a tree.
Charlie and Paul pursue a driver that stole fuel, and Chris and Sophie spot a bunny-hopping learner driver who already has eight points on his provisional license.
Ben and Matt find themselves on a high-speed pursuit which ends up on a road to nowhere.
A worse-for-wear driver in North Tyneside has no plans to come quietly when pursued by the cops, and a police chopper helps track down a driver on the run.
A driver seems more concerned about losing his footwear than getting nicked! And late night, a PC hunts for a suspected cloned car linked to a recent burglary.
With first time access to a police CID unit, this series follows detectives investigating serious cases - from the start of an investigation to the moment they confront their suspects.
Drama series. Mulder and Scully investigate the mysterious case of a military test pilot who disappeared after taking part in secret test flights.
